{{CargoRelic
|name=21,474,836,470
|class_id=20431
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=When these cockroaches converge, enough conviction is generated to lead to the collective belief of "The enemy shall be vanquished!" This is similar to low-level creatures like termites escalating in power when they increase in number. The cockroaches are able to communicate telepathically with other intelligent beings in any language.
50,000 Cockroaches: equivalent intelligence of an ordinary mouse
980,000 Cockroaches: equivalent intelligence of an ordinary chimpanzee
11.43 Million Cockroaches: equivalent intelligence of a human infant
99.51 Million Cockroaches: equivalent intelligence of a young human
763 Million Cockroaches: equivalent intelligence of Einstein
21 Billion Cockroaches: possibly rivaling Earth's Will
|fame=100
|art=95
|fth=95
|civ=95
|tech=95
|ss1=Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail HP +10<br>Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail ATK +1<br>Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail DEF +1<br>Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail RUSH +1<br>Minions Cloned: 10000/10000
|ss2=Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail HP +20<br>Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail ATK +2<br>Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail DEF +2<br>Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail RUSH +2<br>Minions Cloned: 10000/10000
|ss3=Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail HP +30<br>Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail DEF +3<br>Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail RUSH +3<br>Minions Cloned: 10000/10000
|ss4=Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail HP +30<br>Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail DEF +3<br>Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail RUSH +3<br>Minions Cloned: 10000/10000
|ss7=Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail HP +30<br>Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail DEF +3<br>Per 100 Minions Cloned, Snail RUSH +3<br>Minions Cloned: 10000/10000<br> (Awakened)
}}
